entries.title: Impact of AI on cyber threat from now to 2027
entries.summary: An NCSC assessment highlighting the impacts on cyber threat from AI developments between now and 2027.

entries.title: A method to assess 'forgivable' vs 'unforgivable' vulnerabilities
entries.summary: Research from the NCSC designed to eradicate vulnerability classes and make the top-level mitigations easier to implement.

entries.title: The near-term impact of AI on the cyber threat
entries.summary: An NCSC assessment focusing on how AI will impact the efficacy of cyber operations and the implications for the cyber threat over the next two years.

entries.title: ACD - The Sixth Year
entries.summary: Key findings and full report from the 6th year of the Active Cyber Defence (ACD) programme.

entries.title: Cyber Threat Report: UK Legal Sector
entries.summary: An updated report from the NCSC explaining how UK law firms - of all sizes - can protect themselves from common cyber threats.

entries.title: The threat from commercial cyber proliferation
entries.summary: Report informing readers about the threat to UK industry and society from commercial cyber tools and services.

entries.title: Organisational use of Enterprise Connected Devices
entries.summary: Assessing the cyber security threat to UK organisations using Enterprise Connected Devices.

entries.title: ACD - The Fifth Year
entries.summary: Key findings from the 5th year of the Active Cyber Defence (ACD) programme.

entries.title: Threat report on application stores
entries.summary: This report outlines the risks associated with the use of official and third party app stores.

entries.title: Malware analysis report on SparrowDoor malware
entries.summary: A technical analysis of a new variant of the SparrowDoor malware.

entries.title: Vendor Security Assessment
entries.summary: Assessing the security of network equipment.

entries.title: Decrypting diversity: Diversity and inclusion in cyber security report 2021
entries.summary: The 2nd joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK benchmarks against the 2020 findings to gauge what progress has been made.

entries.title: Active Cyber Defence (ACD) - the fourth year
entries.summary: The year four report covers 2020 and aims to highlight the achievements and efforts made by the Active Cyber Defence programme.

entries.title: Active Cyber Defence (ACD) - The Third Year
entries.summary: The year three report covers 2019 and aims to highlight the achievements and efforts made by the Active Cyber Defence programe.

entries.title: Technical report: Responsible use of the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) for ISP interworking
entries.summary: Technical report on best practice use of this fundamental data routing protocol.

entries.title: Decrypting diversity: Diversity and inclusion in cyber security report 2020
entries.summary: Joint report between the NCSC and KPMG UK is the first in a series to benchmark and track levels of diversity and inclusion in the cyber security industry.

entries.title: The cyber threat to sports organisations
entries.summary: The NCSC report highlights the cyber threats faced by the sports sector and suggests how to stop or lessen their impact on organisations.

entries.title: Summary of the NCSC analysis of May 2020 US sanction
entries.summary: A summary of the NCSC’s analysis of the May 2020 US sanction which caused the NCSC to modify the scope of its security mitigation strategy for Huawei.

entries.title: High level privacy and security design for NHS COVID-19 contact tracing app
entries.summary: NCSC technical paper about the privacy and security design of the NHS contact tracing app developed to help slow the spread of coronavirus.

entries.title: Summary of NCSC’s security analysis for the UK telecoms sector
entries.summary: A summary of the NCSC’s security analysis for the UK telecoms sector
